name: supir-v0q
description: Practicing Model Scaling for Photo-Realistic Image Restoration In the Wild. This is the SUPIR-v0Q model and does NOT use LLaVA-13b.

a_prompt.default: Cinematic, High Contrast, highly detailed, taken using a Canon EOS R camera, hyper detailed photo - realistic maximum detail, 32k, Color Grading, ultra HD, extreme meticulous detailing, skin pore detailing, hyper sharpness, perfect without deformations.
a_prompt.description: Additive positive prompt for the inputs.
a_prompt.title: A Prompt

edm_steps.description: Number of steps for EDM Sampling Schedule.
edm_steps.title: Edm Steps

linear_CFG.description: Linearly (with sigma) increase CFG from 'spt_linear_CFG' to s_cfg.
linear_CFG.title: Linear Cfg

linear_s_stage2.description: Linearly (with sigma) increase s_stage2 from 'spt_linear_s_stage2' to s_stage2.
linear_s_stage2.title: Linear S Stage2

n_prompt.default: painting, oil painting, illustration, drawing, art, sketch, oil painting, cartoon, CG Style, 3D render, unreal engine, blurring, dirty, messy, worst quality, low quality, frames, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, deformed, lowres, over-smooth
n_prompt.title: N Prompt

s_stage1.description: Control Strength of Stage1 (negative means invalid).
s_stage1.title: S Stage1

seed.description: Random seed. Leave blank to randomize the seed
seed.title: Seed

spt_linear_CFG.description: Start point of linearly increasing CFG.
spt_linear_CFG.title: Spt Linear Cfg

spt_linear_s_stage2.description: Start point of linearly increasing s_stage2.
spt_linear_s_stage2.title: Spt Linear S Stage2
